overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic industrial district with elevated highways, concrete infrastructure, and large storage tanks. The scene transitions from a covered walkway under highway overpasses to an open industrial plaza with prominent signage and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily beneath elevated highway infrastructure toward industrial district

entered.detail: large yellow-painted elevated highway structure with metal trusses spanning overhead
massive cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway
vertical array of glowing red triangular warning symbols on dark building facade
tall industrial structure with antenna visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward beneath a massive elevated highway system. Yellow steel trusses and concrete pillars dominate the overhead space, while a prominent red neon warning sign becomes visible on the right side of the path. The environment is industrial with concrete walkways and distant towers visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection under elevated highway with industrial buildings

events.description: character turns right at intersection, moving away from the red neon sign

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and passing a bystander near the wall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing orange hat standing near the Wollesen sign

entered.detail: green street sign with white text reading 'Wollesen' mounted on concrete wall
large circular industrial building with metallic dome roof visible in background

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at an intersection, passing a pedestrian in an orange hat. The red neon warning signs recede into the background as a green 'Wollesen' street sign and a large domed industrial building come into view on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service corridor beneath highway overpasses

agents.ego_description: walking through industrial corridor with metal railings and concrete pillars

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking in opposite direction

entered.detail: metal barricade fencing running along the right side of the walkway
large yellow and silver industrial pipes running along the ground and structures

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through a narrow industrial corridor with metal railings on the right and concrete support pillars overhead. The lighting becomes more diffused under the highway structure, and industrial piping becomes visible along the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial plaza with storage tanks and processing equipment

events.description: exits covered corridor into open industrial plaza with large storage tanks

agents.ego_description: walking toward large industrial tank and observing the open plaza with holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive cylindrical industrial storage tank with graffiti and warning symbols on the side
metal escalator or conveyor structure leading up to elevated platform
green street sign reading 'Monte Diablo' at intersection corner
floating vehicle or holographic advertisement suspended in the sky

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered corridor into a wide-open industrial plaza bathed in direct sunlight. A massive storage tank dominates the center view, while a floating holographic advertisement hovers in the sky. The character approaches a street sign reading 'Monte Diablo' as industrial smokestacks rise in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadows of a massive highway underpass into a bright, expansive industrial plaza. It begins beneath a network of yellow steel trusses and concrete pillars, moving past a red neon warning sign through a hazy industrial atmosphere. As the character turns right at an intersection, passing a pedestrian in an orange hat, the scene shifts toward a green Wollesen street sign and a large domed building. The camera then proceeds through a narrow corridor of metal railings and overhead supports where the lighting becomes diffused and industrial piping lines the path. Finally, the view breaks open as the character emerges from the covered structure into direct sunlight, revealing a massive storage tank, a floating holographic advertisement, and a Monte Diablo street sign against a backdrop of rising smokestacks.
